label: OpenAI News
description: Official OpenAI announcements: model releases, research previews, product news. Canonical source for GPT/Sora/o-series updates.

label: Anthropic News
description: Official Anthropic news index covering Claude releases, safety research, policy posts. No public RSS, scraped as webpage.

label: Google DeepMind Blog
description: Google DeepMind official blog: Gemini, AlphaFold, AlphaProof, science-focused AI breakthroughs.

label: Meta AI Blog
description: Meta AI research and product updates: Llama releases, FAIR research, Ray-Ban Meta AI features. Scraped as webpage (no RSS).

label: Google AI Blog
description: Google's consumer-facing AI announcements (separate from DeepMind): Gemini in products, Workspace AI, Search Generative Experience.

label: Hugging Face Daily Papers
description: Curated daily AI/ML papers ranked by community votes. Best single source for what frontier researchers are reading today.

label: Hugging Face Blog
description: Hugging Face engineering posts: model fine-tuning tutorials, library deep-dives, open-source ecosystem updates.

label: arXiv cs.AI
description: arXiv Artificial Intelligence section: daily preprint listings (broad AI scope, including reasoning, planning, multi-agent).

label: arXiv cs.CL
description: arXiv Computation and Language section: NLP and LLM preprints. Where most LLM papers land first.

label: arXiv cs.LG
description: arXiv Machine Learning section: training methods, architectures, optimization, theory papers.

label: arXiv cs.SD
description: arXiv Sound section: audio / music / speech processing preprints. Where most TTS, voice cloning, music generation papers land.

label: arXiv eess.AS
description: arXiv Audio and Speech Processing (EE): DSP-heavy audio/speech work, often overlapping with cs.SD but includes more signal-processing papers.

label: The Gradient
description: Long-form essays on AI research and its societal implications. Editorial, slower-paced, written by researchers for researchers.

label: Distill
description: Interactive ML explainers (mostly archived since 2021 but still canonical reference for visualization-first ML writing).

label: Lilian Weng's Blog
description: Deep technical surveys on LLM agents, prompt engineering, hallucination, RLHF. Considered a gold-standard reference by ML practitioners.

label: Simon Willison's Weblog
description: High-frequency, hands-on commentary on every new LLM release, tool, and SDK. Best single feed to track what is shipping in AI tooling day-to-day.

label: Sebastian Raschka's Magazine
description: Implementation-focused LLM training and architecture deep-dives from the author of Build a Large Language Model From Scratch.

label: Andrej Karpathy's Blog
description: Andrej Karpathy's classic blog (Tesla / OpenAI / Eureka Labs). Infrequent but each post tends to reframe how the field thinks.

label: Claude Code Changelog
description: Official Claude Code (Anthropic CLI) changelog: new commands, model defaults, plugin/skill APIs, harness behavior.

label: Claude Product Release Notes
description: Anthropic Claude consumer/web product release notes: UI features, projects, MCP support, model picker changes.

label: OpenAI Codex Changelog
description: OpenAI Codex agent changelog: new tool integrations, model updates, IDE/CLI behavior changes.

label: Gemini Release Notes
description: Google Gemini consumer app release notes: new model versions, Deep Research, Gems, Canvas, image/video features.

label: GitHub Changelog (incl. Copilot)
description: Full GitHub product changelog feed including Copilot, Actions, Codespaces, Issues. Filter for Copilot entries to track AI coding updates.

label: Cursor Changelog
description: Cursor IDE release notes: agent mode, tab completion model updates, MCP integrations, pricing changes.

label: Windsurf Changelog
description: Windsurf (formerly Codeium) IDE changelog: Cascade agent updates, model availability, new IDE features.

label: JetBrains AI Blog
description: JetBrains AI Assistant and Junie agent updates across IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm. Covers IDE-integrated AI features.

label: 36 Kr (36 氪)
description: Top Chinese tech/startup business publication. Covers funding, product launches, big-tech moves, AI industry analysis from a Chinese market lens.

label: Weibo Hot Search
description: Real-time Weibo trending topics: Chinese mainstream public opinion barometer, mixed entertainment/news/social. Useful for sensing what China is talking about right now.

label: Tencent News
description: Tencent News mainstream Chinese news aggregator: politics, society, finance, tech. Establishment editorial tone.

label: Wall Street CN (华尔街见闻)
description: Chinese financial news in real-time: macro markets, US stocks, A-shares, AI stock moves. Bloomberg-equivalent for Chinese readers.

label: V2EX
description: Chinese-language developer community (think HN with Chinese sensibility). Threads on indie hacking, remote work, side projects, tech career.

label: 少数派 (sspai)
description: Chinese independent tech/lifestyle publication: app reviews, productivity workflows, hardware deep-dives. High editorial quality.

label: 爱范儿 (ifanr)
description: Chinese consumer tech and design publication: Apple-leaning hardware coverage, AI product reviews, lifestyle gadgets. Using FeedBurner mirror; origin feed fails TLS from our IP.

label: Hacker News
description: The default tech-savvy English aggregator. Best signal for what US/EU developers are debating: SaaS, AI papers, infra outages, Show HN launches.

label: GitHub Trending
description: Daily trending repositories on GitHub. Best leading indicator of which open-source projects (often AI tooling) are gaining traction.

label: Product Hunt
description: Daily new product launches voted by tech early-adopters. Skews toward AI wrappers, SaaS tools, indie maker projects.

label: TechCrunch
description: Major US tech publication with daily startup, funding, and big-tech coverage. Mainstream Silicon Valley editorial tone.

label: The Verge
description: Consumer tech, culture, and policy reporting with strong design sensibility. Covers AI consumer products, hardware launches, platform regulation.

label: Ars Technica
description: In-depth tech journalism: deeper than TechCrunch on infrastructure, security, science, and policy stories. Less hype, more analysis.

label: TLDR Tech Newsletter
description: Daily concise tech newsletter: a few sentences each on top stories across startups, big tech, programming. Time-efficient overview.

label: Stack Overflow Blog
description: Stack Overflow's editorial blog: developer survey results, AI/coding workflow trends, engineering culture posts.

label: Smashing Magazine
description: Practical web design and front-end development articles: CSS techniques, accessibility, design systems, UX patterns.

label: CSS-Tricks
description: Front-end development tips, CSS features, snippet-style how-tos. Useful for staying current on browser CSS capabilities.

label: A List Apart
description: Long-form essays on web standards, design strategy, content design. Slower pace, more thoughtful than tutorial sites.

label: UX Collective
description: Curated Medium publication on UX/product design. Mix of practitioner essays, case studies, design leadership pieces.

label: Awwwards
description: Award-winning website showcase: bleeding-edge web design and interactive experiences. Scraped as webpage (no working RSS).

label: Stratechery by Ben Thompson
description: Ben Thompson's tech business strategy analysis. Aggregation theory, platform dynamics, big-tech earnings deep-dives. Free articles via RSS, paid full archive.

label: Lenny's Newsletter
description: Product management, growth, and career advice from Lenny Rachitsky. Interviews with PMs at top tech companies.

label: Next.js Blog
description: Official Next.js framework releases and engineering posts. Tracks the dominant React production framework.

label: Vercel Blog
description: Vercel platform updates plus engineering essays on edge runtime, AI SDK, deployment infrastructure.

label: Changelog (podcast network feed)
description: Open-source and developer culture podcast network. Long-form interviews with maintainers, AI engineers, and infra builders.

label: Suno Blog
description: AI music generation product announcements and research posts from Suno; skip minor marketing copy.

label: Udio Blog
description: Udio product and label-partnership announcements (Warner, UMG) for AI music; skip contest posts.

label: ElevenLabs Blog
description: Voice AI and audio model releases, research and partnership posts; skip customer case studies.

label: Stability AI News
description: Stability AI model releases and music/image partnerships; skip compliance PR posts.

label: Mubert Blog
description: AI generative music platform posts on production, licensing and API use-cases.

label: Ableton Blog
description: Ableton Live / Push / Move release notes and sound-design articles; skip pure artist interviews.

label: Native Instruments Blog
description: Kontakt / Maschine / Traktor tutorials and producer interviews; skip pure artist features.

label: Output Mag
description: Plugin reviews and music production tutorials from Output.

label: Music Business Worldwide
description: Music industry business news: label deals, streaming economics, AI licensing.

label: Music Ally
description: Music and streaming tech analysis from Music Ally; industry data and platform updates.

label: YouTube Official Blog
description: YouTube product, creator-policy and platform announcements; skip non-creator marketing.

label: Spotify Newsroom
description: Spotify product launches, partnerships and editorial features for music streaming.

label: DeepSeek API Changelog
description: DeepSeek model version upgrades and API capability changes.

label: 阿里云百炼 产品动态
description: 阿里云百炼 / 通义大模型平台模型上下架与功能更新动态。

label: Runway News
description: Runway video AI model releases (Gen-3/Gen-4), research and partnership posts.

label: Black Forest Labs Blog
description: FLUX image/video model releases and partnership announcements from Black Forest Labs.

label: React Blog
description: Official React team posts: releases, compiler, security advisories.

label: The Vue Point
description: Official Vue.js major-release and ecosystem announcements (low volume).

label: TypeScript Blog
description: TypeScript release announcements from Microsoft DevBlogs (low volume).

label: Vite Releases
description: Vite / create-vite / plugin-legacy GitHub release feed.

label: Bun Blog
description: Bun runtime release notes and deep-dive feature articles (high volume).
